Mod.Name: [Tsunamods] FF8 Gameplay Customizer
Mod.Author: Hobbitdur
Mod.Description:
► The ultimate gameplay tweaks ◄
This mods aims to bring lots of options to the gameplay to enjoy your game how you want it !
◆ General option ◄ • Language: Only used for gerogero.
◆ Quality of life ◄ • DamageCap: All damage can deal up to 65.535 (Eden damage is also cap to 65.535). • NoMagicDepletion: Using magic doesn't decrease your stock. • DrawRework: Change the draw logic (Either draw more than 9 or draw 100)
◆ Special thanks ◄ • myst6re for Deling tool and RE work • Maki for his work on RE • DangerousDom for beta testing • SlimeBucket for the preview
